metadata.title: Auto Link Title
metadata.description: This plugin automatically fetches the titles of links from the web

regex.source: name: "Paste URL and auto fetch title"
name: "Enhance existing URL with link and title"
regex.target: name: "增强现有URL，附带链接和标题"

regex.source: .setDesc("Fetch the link title when pasting a link in the editor with the default paste command")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用默认粘贴命令在编辑器中粘贴链接时获取链接标题")

regex.source: .setDesc("Fetch the link title when drag and dropping a link from another program")
regex.target: .setDesc("从另一个程序中拖放链接时获取链接标题")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the maximum length of the title. Set to 0 to disable.")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置标题的最大长度。设置为0以禁用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to prefer selected text as title over fetched title when pasting")
regex.target: .setDesc("粘贴时是否优先选择选中文本作为标题而不是获取的标题")

regex.source: .setDesc("List of strings (comma separated) that disable autocompleting website titles. Can be URLs or arbitrary text.")
regex.target: .setDesc("阻止自动完成网站标题的字符串列表（逗号分隔）。可以是URL或任意文本。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use experimental new scraper, seems to work well on desktop but not mobile.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用实验性的新抓取器，似乎在桌面端表现良好但在移动端不行。")

regex.source: Notice("LinkPreview API key must be 32 characters long")
regex.target: Notice("LinkPreview API 密钥必须有32个字符")

regex.source: .log(`Unable to find text "${pasteId}" in current editor, bailing out; link ${url}`)
regex.target: .log(`无法在当前编辑器中找到文本 "${pasteId}" , bailing out; link ${url}`)

regex.source: .log("Title via Link Preview failed, falling back to scraper")
regex.target: .log("通过链接预览标题失败,回到scraper")

regex.source: .error("LinkPreview API key is not 32 characters long, please check your settings")
regex.target: .error("LinkPreview API 密钥不超过32个字符，请检查您的设置")

regex.source: .setDesc("Use a more readable placeholder when fetching the title of a link.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在获取链接标题时使用更可读的占位符")

regex.source: .setDesc("API key for the LinkPreview.net service. Get one at https://my.linkpreview.net/access_keys")
